name: Stability AI
description: Stability AI provides image generation, editing, and enhancement powered by Stable Diffusion models. Generate images from text prompts, transform existing images, upscale low-resolution images, remove backgrounds, inpaint specific regions, and search-and-replace objects within images.

capabilities.name: generate_image
capabilities.description: Generate an image from a text prompt using Stable Diffusion 3. Supports multiple aspect ratios, output formats, and negative prompts.

capabilities.name: image_to_image
capabilities.description: Transform an existing image guided by a text prompt. Control the transformation strength to balance between the original image and the prompt.

capabilities.name: upscale_image
capabilities.description: Upscale a low-resolution image to higher resolution while preserving and enhancing details.

capabilities.name: remove_background
capabilities.description: Automatically remove the background from an image, isolating the foreground subject with transparency.

capabilities.name: inpaint_image
capabilities.description: Edit specific regions of an image by providing a mask and a text prompt describing what to generate in the masked area.

capabilities.name: search_and_replace
capabilities.description: Find and replace objects or elements in an image by describing what to search for and what to replace it with.
